raw_action_dict.reasoning: Track curves right ahead (waypoint 110 delta ≈ -28°), car is slightly left of center at 87% progress, need moderate right steering to follow the track line.
knowledge: Track loops sharply south then back northeast around waypoints 95-110
After waypoint 108, track begins curving back northeast/north then turns right
Waypoints 109-112 trend south/southeast — car must turn right here
At progress ~87%, car is exiting bottom turn and entering right-curving section
Car heading -50° needs to decrease (more negative) to follow track right
Positive delta = steer left, negative delta = steer right
At delta -28°, use steering_angle=-15 at speed 1.5
Car is left of center — track curving right confirms right steering needed
Avoid oversteer: use -15 not -20 for delta around -28°
Watch for track straightening after waypoint 112 heading northeast
